title: One-of-Each Frame Solution
description: A one-of-each solution for the 13 Tile Frame. This is one of 1500 solutions.

title: Mixed Bubble Tiling H4B/T1
description: A tiling example combining H4B with triangular T1 bubble tiles.

title: Square Bubble Tiling S3/S0
description: A compact square bubble tiling using the S3/S0 pairing.

title: Hex Puzzle Spiral H1/H5
description: A large spiral patch built from hexagonal puzzle tiles H1 and H5.

title: Spectre Cluster
description: A starter cluster made with Spectre monotiles.

title: Mixed Bubble Tiling Full Set
description: A large tiling using the full hexagonal bubble family together with triangular bubble tiles.

title: Hex Bubble Tiling H0/H4C
description: A four-tile tiling seed using one H0 tile and three H4C tiles.

title: Hex Bubble Tiling H1/H5
description: A two-tile tiling seed using the dual pair H1 and H5.

title: Regular Polygon Tiling
description: A colored tiling made from regular triangles, squares, and hexagons.

title: Large Frame Styled Design
description: A styled large-frame design with a dark background, thicker strokes, and patterned fills.

title: Triangular Puzzle Tile Tiling
description: A tiling example using all four triangular puzzle tile types.

title: Soft Tile Tiling SF1/SF3B
description: A tiling example using soft tiles SF1 and SF3B.

title: Cloud Soft Tile Tiling SF2B
description: A single soft SF2B tile with a cloud texture repeated by tiling fill.

title: Pac-Man Octagon Tiling
description: A large tiling patch using the Pac-Man Octagon 1 shape.

title: Rhombic Bubble Tiling
description: A four-tile tiling seed using rhombic bubble tiles RB1, RB2A/RB2B, and RB3A.

title: Pac-Man Pentagon Tiling
description: A large tiling built from Pac-Man Pentagon tiles.

title: Puzzle Squiggle Octagon Tiling
description: A three-tile tiling seed using puzzle-styled Squiggle Octagon bubble tiles.

title: Spike Style Tiling H3C/H3A
description: A tiling example using the compact Spike Bubble Style on H3C/H3A triangular bubble tiles.

title: Heesch Number 1
description: A Heesch-number-one example layout using soft, hexagonal bubble, and five-sided trapezoid-based tiles.
